name: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], float PresentValues[], byte LimitAchievedFlags[], char EVSEID[], long SAScheduleTupleID )
description: Creates a Current Demand Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
